title: casuarina stricta var. rigida
intro: Casuarina stricta var. rigida, also known as the River She-oak, is a variety of the Casuarina stricta tree, native to northern Australia and New Guinea. This evergreen tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The River She-oak is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. The leaves and branches of the Casuarina stricta var. rigida can be used to prepare herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal preparation.
